# Conductivity Analysis

**Summary**: Measuring electrical conductivity to determine the continuous phase in an emulsion.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-mohamed|MOHAMED, 2014]] used conductivity and dilution tests to identify the internal and external phases of the emulsions.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Water-in-oil (W/O) emulsions were identified as nonconductive, while oil-in-water (O/W) were conductive. ([[2014-mohamed|MOHAMED, 2014, p. 35]])
